filesModified.purpose: Remove self-start from swiper-slide for equal-height cards; restyle video modal close button with carousel-nav-btn

fixesApplied.description: Removed `self-start` from swiper-slide class to allow equal-height cards
fixesApplied.detail: Changed `swiper-slide self-start h-auto!` to `swiper-slide h-auto!`. The `self-start` was overriding the flexbox stretch alignment that Swiper's wrapper provides, preventing cards from being equal height. The card template already has `flex flex-col h-full` on the article, `flex-1` on the content div, and `mt-auto` on the video button, so removing `self-start` allows the existing flex layout to work correctly.

fixesApplied.description: Restyled video modal close button to use carousel-nav-btn pattern
fixesApplied.detail: Restructured the modal inner HTML: separated the overflow-hidden container (video area with rounded corners) from the close button by adding a wrapper div. The close button now uses `carousel-nav-btn` class for the circular bordered style with gradient hover animation, positioned at `-top-5 -right-5 md:-top-6 md:-right-6` to overlap the top-right corner of the video area. The `.testimonial-video-close` class is preserved for JS event listener compatibility. The SVG icon retains the same X path. The carousel-nav-btn CSS handles sizing (w-10 h-10 md:w-12 md:h-12), border, rounded-full, and the hover gradient animation.

warnings: Asset size warnings for editor.js, screen bundle, and css/screen (pre-existing)

syncStatus.notes: TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender for the carousel area - slides are rendered by PHP only. The modal is frontend-only (PHP). No TSX changes needed.
